name: RevolutX
description: Trade smarter on Revolut X. Check balances, analyze markets, place orders, and run grid trading strategies. All through natural language in Claude.

tools.name: get_instructions
tools.description: CALL THIS FIRST. Returns mandatory usage rules and tool overview. Rule 1: never assume any tool exists — verify first. Rule 2: never place orders autonomously — only recommend CLI commands for the user to run.

tools.name: generate_keypair
tools.description: Generate a new Ed25519 keypair for Revolut X API authentication. Creates a private key (stored securely on your machine) and returns the public key. You must add the public key to your Revolut X account under Profile > API Keys.

tools.name: configure_api_key
tools.description: Save your Revolut X API key. Run this after you have added your public key to your Revolut X account and received an API key.

tools.name: check_auth_status
tools.description: Check if Revolut X API authentication is configured and working. Tests the connection by fetching available currencies.

tools.name: get_balances
tools.description: Get all crypto exchange balances for your Revolut X account. Returns a list of all currencies with available, reserved, and total amounts.

tools.name: get_currencies
tools.description: Get all available currencies on Revolut X exchange. Returns currency symbols, names, asset types (crypto/fiat), decimal precision, and status.

tools.name: get_currency_pairs
tools.description: Get all tradeable currency pairs on Revolut X exchange. Returns pair details including base/quote currencies, step sizes, min/max order sizes, and status.

tools.name: get_order_book
tools.description: Get the current order book for a trading pair.

tools.name: get_tickers
tools.description: Get current ticker data for all trading pairs. Returns bid, ask, mid, and last price for each pair.

tools.name: get_candles
tools.description: Get OHLCV candlestick data for a trading pair.

tools.name: order_command
tools.description: Generate a revx CLI command for order operations. Supports: place_market, place_limit, cancel. Returns the exact CLI command to run.

tools.name: get_active_orders
tools.description: Get all currently active (open) orders on your Revolut X account.

tools.name: get_historical_orders
tools.description: Get your historical (completed, cancelled, rejected) orders on Revolut X. Optionally filter by trading pair and date range.

tools.name: get_client_trades
tools.description: Get your personal trade history (fills) for a specific trading pair.

tools.name: get_order_fills
tools.description: Get fill details for a specific order. Returns individual trade executions that filled the order.

tools.name: strategy_command
tools.description: Generate a revx CLI command for grid trading strategy operations. Supports: backtest (test on historical data), optimize (find best parameters), run (live trading). Returns the exact CLI command to run.

tools.name: grid_status
tools.description: Read the saved state of a grid trading bot for a specific trading pair. Shows strategy config, grid levels with positions/orders, P&L stats, and recent trades.

tools.name: grid_states_list
tools.description: List all saved grid bot states. Returns the trading pairs that have saved state files, which can be inspected with grid_status or resumed with the strategy run command.

tools.name: grid_backtest
tools.description: Run a grid trading backtest on historical candle data from Revolut X. Simulates a grid strategy with geometrically spaced price levels. Returns total trades, realized P&L, net return, max drawdown, and annualized return.

tools.name: grid_optimize
tools.description: Test multiple grid parameter combinations and return ranked results. Runs grid backtest for every combination of grid levels and range percentages, then ranks by total return, Calmar ratio, and drawdown.

tools.name: monitor_command
tools.description: Generate a revx CLI command to start monitoring a trading pair for alert conditions. Returns the exact CLI command to run. Use 'monitor_types' to see all supported alert types.

tools.name: monitor_types
tools.description: List all supported monitor types for the 'revx monitor' CLI command. Returns each type with description, config fields, and CLI usage example.

tools.name: get_order_by_id
tools.description: Get the full details of a single order by its venue order ID. Supports market, limit, conditional, and tpsl orders.

tools.name: connector_command
tools.description: Generate a revx CLI command for notification connector operations. Supports connector types: telegram. Actions: add subscription, list, delete, enable, disable, test. Returns the exact CLI command to run.

config_dir.title: Config Directory
config_dir.description: Directory for storing API keys and configuration

worker_url.title: Worker URL
worker_url.description: URL of the RevolutX Worker service (needed for alerts and Telegram tools). Start Worker with: cd revolut-x-api && docker compose up -d
